message:
fix: make E2E stumble test deterministic

The old test asserted that a second LLM run produces fewer stumbles
than the first, which is inherently non-deterministic. Replaced with
a test that verifies: (1) session completes without crashing, and
(2) genome remains loadable after learn activity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
